auto_approve.mechanism: Copilot CLI does not document pre-configured auto-approval for MCP tools

enterprise_management.mechanism: Copilot CLI does not document organization-level MCP management

env_var_expansion.mechanism: Copilot CLI MCP configuration does not document environment variable expansion

marketplace.mechanism: Copilot CLI does not have an in-IDE MCP marketplace

oauth_support.mechanism: Copilot CLI MCP does not document OAuth 2.0 authentication

resource_referencing.mechanism: Copilot CLI does not document MCP resource referencing

tool_filtering.mechanism: mcp_tool_allow_deny_flags: Copilot CLI supports per-tool allow and deny flags to control which MCP tools are exposed

transport_types.mechanism: Copilot CLI supports both local (stdio) and remote (HTTP/SSE) MCP server types, confirmed in concepts/context/mcp.md

providerExtensions.name: Built-In GitHub MCP Server
providerExtensions.summary: A GitHub MCP server ships inside the Copilot CLI binary and is always present in the tool set, available without additional configuration; it can be disabled via --disable-builtin-mcps.

providerExtensions.name: Interactive /mcp Slash Commands
providerExtensions.summary: The /mcp slash-command suite (add, show, edit, delete, disable, enable, auth, reload) manages MCP servers at runtime without restart.

providerExtensions.name: Personal MCP Configuration File
providerExtensions.summary: ~/.copilot/mcp-config.json uses a {mcpServers:{NAME:CONFIG}} structure with per-server type, command/url, env, and tools fields.

providerExtensions.name: Per-Tool Allow/Deny CLI Flags
providerExtensions.summary: The --allow-tool, --deny-tool, --available-tools, --excluded-tools, and --allow-all-tools CLI flags grant or deny MCP tools (and built-in tools) without manual approval; --disable-builtin-mcps and --disable-mcp-server disable servers.

providerExtensions.name: GitHub MCP Server Toolset Control
providerExtensions.summary: The --add-github-mcp-tool, --add-github-mcp-toolset, and --enable-all-github-mcp-tools flags selectively enable GitHub MCP server tools beyond the default CLI subset.

providerExtensions.name: GitHub MCP Registry
providerExtensions.summary: The GitHub MCP Registry (github.com/mcp) is a curated list of MCP servers from partners and the community, usable for discovery alongside the built-in GitHub MCP server.
